title: Radium
description: Radium is an Unofficial Fork of CaffeineMC's "Lithium", made to work with Forge Mod Loader.
body:
# What is Radium?
An unofficial fork of [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) by CaffeineMC, on Forge

# Canary
Canary basically just disables some important Lithium optimizations, besides Canary is a hardfork and upgrading to upstream is slow, we act differently.

# Modpack Permissions
This is a free and open-source project; you can include it in your mod pack as long as you provide attribution!

# Common Questions
+ **For any other questions, please contact our [discord](https://discord.gg/UCsyn5RS4s "Discord")!**
